# Changelog

## 1.0.0 — 2026-07-03

- Initial bilingual RU↔EN transcreation workflow.
- Three operating modes: faithful, adaptive, and campaign.
- Separate Russian and English voice profiles.
- Claim-integrity and bilingual-parity gates.
- Channel playbooks for landing pages, ads, email, social, articles, UI, sales, and press.
- Brand-context, voice, glossary, and brief templates.
- Trigger and quality eval cases.
- Codex and Codex installation scripts.
